theme.title: Theme
theme.accentColorDesc: Primary accent color for buttons and highlights

display.title: Display
display.fontSizeDesc: Base font size for the interface
display.fontFamilyDesc: Monospace font for terminal and code

layout.title: Layout
layout.compactModeDesc: Reduce spacing and padding for a denser interface

language.title: Language
language.selectLanguageDesc: Choose the language for the interface

cursor.title: Cursor
cursor.cursorStyleDesc: Choose the shape of the cursor

scrolling.title: Scrolling
scrolling.scrollbackLinesDesc: Number of lines to keep in scroll history

copyPaste.title: Copy & Paste
copyPaste.copyOnSelectDesc: Automatically copy selected text to clipboard
copyPaste.rightClickPasteDesc: Paste from clipboard on right click

bell.title: Bell
bell.bellStyleDesc: Notification when bell character is received

startup.title: Startup
startup.launchAtLoginDesc: Automatically start WiseCLI when you log in

window.title: Window
window.minimizeToTrayDesc: Keep the app running in the system tray when minimized
window.closeBehaviorDesc: What happens when you close the window

shortcuts.title: Keyboard Shortcuts
shortcuts.description: Customize keyboard shortcuts for common actions
shortcuts.globalShortcutsDesc: Work even when WiseCLI is not focused
shortcuts.applicationShortcutsDesc: Work only when WiseCLI is focused

notifyOn.title: Notify On
notifyOn.agentTaskCompleteDesc: When an agent finishes a task
notifyOn.agentErrorsDesc: When an agent encounters an error

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.description: Manage your privacy and data settings

telemetry.title: Telemetry
telemetry.anonymousUsageDataDesc: Help improve WiseCLI by sending anonymous usage statistics

dataRetention.title: Data Retention
dataRetention.historyRetentionDesc: How long to keep session history

proxy.title: Proxy
proxy.enableProxyDesc: Route traffic through a proxy server

developer.title: Developer
developer.debugModeDesc: Enable debug features and verbose logging

dangerZone.title: Danger Zone
dangerZone.resetAllSettingsDesc: This will reset all application settings to their default values. Your Claude CLI settings and sessions will not be affected.
